ddls:
CREATE TABLE "properties" (
  "property_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each property */,
  "address" TEXT /* Full address of the property */,
  "property_type" TEXT /* Type of the property (e.g., Terraced, Semi-Detached) */,
  "no_beds" INTEGER /* Number of bedrooms in the property */,
  "price" TEXT /* Selling price of the property */,
  "sold_date" TEXT /* Date when the property was sold */,
  "area" TEXT /* Size of the property in square feet/meters */,
  "year_built" INTEGER /* Year the property was built */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current status of the property (available, under offer, sold) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the property */,
  "neighborhood" TEXT /* Neighborhood where the property is located */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("property_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "agents" (
  "agent_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each agent */,
  "agent_name" TEXT /* Full name of the agent */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the agent */,
  "phone" TEXT /* Phone number of the agent */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the agent (e.g., sales, admin) */,
  "join_date" TEXT /* Date when the agent joined the agency */,
  "active" INTEGER /* Indicates if the agent is currently active */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("agent_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_agents_role FOREIGN KEY ("role") REFERENCES roles ("role_name")
)

CREATE TABLE "sales" (
  "sale_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each sale transaction */,
  "property_id" INTEGER /* ID of the property being sold */,
  "agent_id" INTEGER /* ID of the agent involved in the sale */,
  "sale_date" TEXT /* Date when the sale was completed */,
  "sale_price" TEXT /* Final sale price of the property */,
  "commission" TEXT /* Commission earned from the sale */,
  "customer_id" INTEGER /* ID of the customer who purchased the property */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("sale_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sales_agent_id FOREIGN KEY ("agent_id") REFERENCES agents ("agent_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sales_property_id FOREIGN KEY ("property_id") REFERENCES properties ("property_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sales_customer_id FOREIGN KEY ("customer_id") REFERENCES customers ("customer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "customers" (
  "customer_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each customer */,
  "customer_name" TEXT /* Full name of the customer */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the customer */,
  "phone" TEXT /* Phone number of the customer */,
  "interested_property" INTEGER /* ID of the property the customer is interested in */,
  "budget" TEXT /* Budget of the customer */,
  "preferences" TEXT /* Specific preferences of the customer */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("customer_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_customers_interested_property FOREIGN KEY ("interested_property") REFERENCES properties ("property_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "roles" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each role */,
  "role_name" TEXT /* Name of the role (e.g., sales, admin) */,
  "permissions" TEXT /* Permissions associated with the role (e.g., view properties, manage sales) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the role */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id")
)
